back_translation: Now Joshua was old, advanced in days, and the LORD said to him, 'You have grown old, advanced in days, but very much of the land remains to be possessed.
This is the land that remains: all the regions of the Philistines, and all the Geshurites,

from the Shihor which is east of Egypt, even to the border of Ekron northward (reckoned to the Canaanite), the five rulers of the Philistines — the Gazite and the Ashdodite, the Ashkelonite, the Gittite, and the Ekronite — and the Avvim;
from the south, all the land of the Canaanite, and Mearah which belongs to the Sidonians, as far as Aphek, as far as the border of the Amorite;
and the land of the Gebalite, and all Lebanon toward the sunrise (east), from Baal-gad under Mount Hermon as far as the entry of Hamath.

All the inhabitants of the hill country from Lebanon as far as Misrephoth-maim, all the Sidonians — I Myself will dispossess them from before the sons of Israel. Only allot it to Israel as an inheritance, as I have commanded you.
Now therefore divide this land as an inheritance to the nine tribes and the half-tribe of Manasseh.'

With him (i.e., the other half-tribe), the Reubenite and the Gadite had received their inheritance, which Moses had given them beyond the Jordan to the east, just as Moses the servant of the LORD had given them:
from Aroer which is on the rim of the Wadi Arnon, and the city which is in the middle of the wadi, and all the plateau of Medeba as far as Dibon;
and all the cities of Sihon king of the Amorites, who reigned in Heshbon, as far as the border of the sons of Ammon;
and Gilead, and the border of the Geshurite and the Maacathite, and all Mount Hermon, and all Bashan as far as Salecah;
all the kingdom of Og in Bashan, who reigned in Ashtaroth and in Edrei — he was left from the remnant of the Rephaim. Moses had struck them down and dispossessed them.
But the sons of Israel did not drive out the Geshurite and the Maacathite, and Geshur and Maacath dwell in the midst of Israel to this day.
Only to the tribe of Levi he did not give an inheritance; the food-offerings of the LORD, the God of Israel, are their inheritance, just as He had spoken to them.
And Moses gave to the tribe of the sons of Reuben according to their clans:
Their border was from Aroer which is on the rim of the Wadi Arnon, and the city which is in the middle of the wadi, and all the plateau by Medeba;
Heshbon and all its cities which are on the plateau — Dibon and Bamoth-baal and Beth-baal-meon,
and Jahaz and Kedemoth and Mephaath,
and Kiriathaim and Sibmah and Zereth-shahar on the hill of the valley,
and Beth-peor and the slopes of Pisgah and Beth-jeshimoth —

and all the cities of the plateau and all the kingdom of Sihon king of the Amorites who reigned in Heshbon, whom Moses struck down along with the chiefs of Midian — Evi and Rekem and Zur and Hur and Reba — the princes of Sihon, the inhabitants of the land.
And Balaam son of Beor, the diviner, the sons of Israel killed with the sword among their slain.
And the border of the sons of Reuben was the Jordan and the border. This was the inheritance of the sons of Reuben according to their clans — the cities and their villages.
And Moses gave to the tribe of Gad, to the sons of Gad according to their clans:
Their border was Jazer and all the cities of Gilead, and half the land of the sons of Ammon as far as Aroer which faces Rabbah,
and from Heshbon as far as Ramath-mizpeh and Betonim, and from Mahanaim as far as the border of Lidebir;

and in the valley, Beth-haram and Beth-nimrah and Succoth and Zaphon — the rest of the kingdom of Sihon king of Heshbon, the Jordan and the border, as far as the edge of the Sea of Chinnereth, beyond the Jordan to the east.
This was the inheritance of the sons of Gad according to their clans — the cities and their villages.
And Moses gave to the half-tribe of Manasseh, and it was for the half-tribe of the sons of Manasseh according to their clans:
Their border was from Mahanaim — all of Bashan, all the kingdom of Og king of Bashan, and all the villages of Jair which are in Bashan, sixty cities;
and half of Gilead and Ashtaroth and Edrei, cities of the kingdom of Og in Bashan, for the sons of Machir son of Manasseh — for half of the sons of Machir according to their clans.
These are what Moses had allotted in the plains of Moab, beyond the Jordan of Jericho to the east.
But to the tribe of Levi Moses did not give an inheritance; the LORD, the God of Israel, He is their inheritance, just as He had spoken to them.
